deviations.description: The process model only requires the activity 'ask patient about pain' every 20 minutes when local anesthesia is administered to a high-tolerance patient. It does not require 'administer additional anesthesia' every 20 minutes, as mandated by the stricter Version 2 requirement. This results in a direct violation of the new obligation.

The process continues to require 'ask patient about pain' every 20 minutes, which is no longer mandated by Version 2. This enforces an outdated constraint that is not required by the current compliance requirement.

The process model does not implement the new periodicity constraint for 'administer additional anesthesia' every 20 minutes. The absence of this periodic action constitutes a violation of the updated compliance requirement.
